raw_consumer_statement: I was billed XXXX on my credit card from a company called XXXX XXXX Out of Texas XXXX XX/XX/year>. I did not make this purchase cause my utility company is out of XXXX NY. The credit card company said the chip was was used and that's false cause when I use the chip I get a receipt. I keep my receipt and I don't have one from that company. Help would be appreciated Thank you!
